scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');if(fs.existsSync('node_modules/next/package.json')){console.log('Dependencies already installed')}else{console.log('Installing dependencies with npm ci...');cp.execSync('npm ci --no-audit --no-fund',{stdio:'inherit'});}"
scripts.check:next: node -e "try{require('next/package.json');console.log('next dependency found')}catch(e){console.error('Missing dependencies. Run: npm ci');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:worker && npx wrangler deploy
